title: Reconcile the month-long summary gap before Monday's brief
description: No decisions feed or briefs have reached the Action Tracker since May 19. For each of the four expected meetings — May 26, Jun 1, Jun 8, Jun 15 — confirm whether it occurred and either (a) backfill its decisions + action items into decisions/feed.md so I can register the new actions, or (b) mark it cancelled on the record. Also resolve whether the team has gone heads-down on the Series B raise; if so, LM-027 and LM-034 should be formally Deferred rather than carried as Overdue. This is the 2nd consecutive week the gap has been flagged; until it's reconciled the "no surprises before Monday" guarantee does not hold.
